{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":361194,"duration_api_ms":261819,"num_turns":33,"result":"Phase 1 완료. `ff60bfd3`로 커밋.

**변경 요약:**
- `contact-timeline.service.ts` — `getTimeline`에 양쪽 DB가 비었을 때만 `contacts` 테이블에서 파생하는 fallback 경로 추가 + `buildFallbackTimeline`/`deriveCreatedActor`/`guessMimeType` 3개 private 메서드 신설
- `timeline-item.dto.ts` + `src/lib/types/contact.ts` — `StatusChangePayload`/`DrawingRevisionPayload`에 optional `fallback?: boolean` 추가
- `index.json` — phase 1 → `completed`

**AC 결과:**
- `pnpm build`: 통과
- `pnpm test`: 타임라인 테스트 6/6 통과. 전체 기존 실패 59건은 phase 1 변경과 무관한 pre-existing (stash pop 전후 동일 확인)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"1d6adcd3-fe8e-4d92-a3d8-ffb1ffd102e8","total_cost_usd":2.2886889999999998,"usage":{"input_tokens":107,"cache_creation_input_tokens":122116,"cache_read_input_tokens":1979708,"output_tokens":21403,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":122116,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":6,"output_tokens":337,"cache_read_input_tokens":138506,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1529,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1529},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":107,"outputTokens":21403,"cacheReadInputTokens":1979708,"cacheCreationInputTokens":122116,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.2886889999999998,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"d93a944d-e49a-44b5-a1b4-1363a09f74db"}
